caption: A screen recording shows a Google Sheets spreadsheet titled "10/22/23 - 2023 Topps Museum Collection Baseball 6-Box 1/2 Case #2". The spreadsheet contains columns with team names and rows labeled "Rookie Wonder" and "Case Wonder." A chat window on the right displays messages from "engaged" and "Nightbot," including the text, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can" and "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/3ezSkG0". The bottom of the screen features a website banner for "WWW.JAESPYSCASEBREAKS.COM" and a logo for "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the recording progresses, a user interacts with the sheet, adding numbers to the "Rookie Wonder" and "Case Wonder" columns. By the final frame, the "Count" at the bottom right changes to "Sum: 48," indicating entries have been totaled.
